title: <div>    &ltli&gt📌 If you&rsquo;re dismissed, you can still earn attendance
content:
<li>📌 If you’re dismissed, you can still earn attendance by taking the weekly assessment and scoring at least a C (learn more in Section 3 below).</li>
</ul>
<hr />
<h3>📌 2. Assigned Seating (Self-Selection Begins Week 6)</h3>
<p>Starting Week 6, you’ll choose your seat based on how you engage. If you participate regularly, sit toward the center. If you prefer to listen, sit in the outer rows.</p>
<ul>
<li>✅ <strong>Rows 2 & 3:</strong> For students who actively contribute to discussions.</li>
<li>✅ <strong>Rows 1 & 4:</strong> For students who prefer to observe.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>If it looks like your seating choice doesn’t match your level of engagement, I’ll ask you to move.</strong></p>
<hr />
<h3>📌 3. Alternative Assessment Option: "The Analytical Review"</h3>
<p>For students who prefer <strong>not to attend lectures or discussions</strong>, or <strong>are unable to follow appropriate classroom conduct</strong>, you may take <strong>"The Analytical Review,"</strong> an assessment that reinterprets the week’s content through different perspectives.</p>
